name: lovable-cloud-to-supabase-exporter-cli
description: CLI for exporting Lovable Cloud databases and storage into Supabase.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --clean --format esm --out-dir dist --dts && pnpm run sync:edge-function
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --out-dir dist --dts --watch --onSuccess "pnpm run sync:edge-function"
scripts.sync:edge-function: mkdir -p dist/edge-function && cp ../../edge-function/index.ts dist/edge-function/index.ts && rm -rf dist/__tests__
scripts.serve:watch: sh -lc 'until [ -f dist/index.js ]; do sleep 1; done; node --watch dist/index.js serve --port 8799'
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
